---
title: "Sowing and Sewing: A Sexagesima Story - by Charlotte Mary Yonge(1882)"
year: 1882
slug: "Sowing and Sewing"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


#### [Online text ofSowing and Sewing: A Sexagesima Storyfrom Gutenberg  
  
](http://www.mirrorservice.org/sites/ftp.ibiblio.org/pub/docs/books/gutenberg/3/2/2/0/32200/32200-h/32200-h.htm)

[Click here to read or download](http://www.mirrorservice.org/sites/ftp.ibiblio.org/pub/docs/books/gutenberg/3/2/2/0/32200/32200-h/32200-h.htm)
